description: Purview Atlas custom entity type definitions for Enercare call center domain. POST these to /catalog/api/atlas/v2/types/typedefs before registering assets.

classificationDefs.name: EnercareCustomerPII
classificationDefs.description: Column contains Enercare customer personally identifiable information

classificationDefs.name: EncareKPICertified
classificationDefs.description: This asset represents or feeds a certified Enercare KPI definition

classificationDefs.name: EnercareOrphaned
classificationDefs.description: Asset has no downstream mappings — matches 5_Orphaned_Objects in catalog analysis

entityDefs.name: EnercareKPIDefinition
entityDefs.description: A certified KPI definition from dbo.ref_kpi_definitions — the single source of truth for business metrics

entityDefs.name: EnercareCallCenterTable
entityDefs.description: A table in the Enercare call center schema (dw_inbnd_t)

attributeDefs.name: source_system
attributeDefs.description: Clarify | Zuora | NS | CP360 — which upstream system feeds this table

entityDefs.name: EnercareAIInsight
entityDefs.description: An AI-generated insight written back from Copilot/Data Agent analysis — closes the metadata loop

businessMetadataDefs.name: EnercareBusinessSemantics
businessMetadataDefs.description: Business-level metadata attributes for Enercare data assets — applied to columns and tables to feed Copilot context

attributeDefs.name: BusinessDefinition
attributeDefs.description: Plain-English definition for business users and Copilot

attributeDefs.name: CalculationLogic
attributeDefs.description: How this metric or field is calculated

attributeDefs.name: LinkedKPICode
attributeDefs.description: KPI code from ref_kpi_definitions if this column feeds a certified KPI

attributeDefs.name: SourceSystem
attributeDefs.description: Clarify | Zuora | NS | CP360 — upstream origin

attributeDefs.name: AIInstruction
attributeDefs.description: Instruction text for Copilot/Data Agent about how to interpret this field

attributeDefs.name: CertifiedFlg
attributeDefs.description: Y = approved for Copilot verified answer; N = not certified
